next_steps: Comprehensive drug urine toxicology screen including cannabinoids
Upper endoscopy (EGD) with biopsies to evaluate for H. pylori and eosinophilic infiltration
Assessment of nutritional status and iron deficiency etiology
Inpatient stabilization with intravenous fluids and antiemetics

differential_diagnoses: Peptic ulcer disease with H. pylori
next_steps: Obtain urine porphobilinogen and delta-aminolevulinic acid levels
Upper endoscopy with gastric and duodenal biopsies
